variables.notes: Candidate list misses important SG&A labels visible in the statement. Following the SG&A hierarchy: an explicit SG&A row 'Sales and Distribution Expenses' exists but is mostly empty in preview, so I included it plus closest overhead buckets for coverage. I selected 'Salaries and other personnel expenses' and 'Other Operating Expense' and avoided 'Operating Expense' because it clearly includes depreciation/amortization, which must be excluded. Kept selection minimal to reduce double counting risk. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales and Distribution Expenses, [Income Statement] Other Operating Expense
No dedicated research/development row appears in the income statement.
